title: Refund Policy
description: Refund-specific fields layered onto the base Policy envelope when `type == "dev.ucp.shopping.policy.refund"`. Covers pre-purchase disclosure of the return/refund window only. Post-purchase resolution — return methods, fees, refund destination, supported resolutions — is out of scope and belongs to a future return-action capability, where the buyer-supplied reason, item condition, and return origin are known.

window.description: The return window the business commits to — a duration, not a pre-computed deadline. Absent when `final_sale` is true.

days.description: Length of the return window in days.

from.description: Anchor event from which the window is measured. Open vocabulary. Well-known values: `delivered` (industry default), `shipped`, `placed`. Platforms MUST tolerate unknown values.

final_sale.description: When true, the targeted items are non-returnable (final sale) and no return window applies. Mutually exclusive with `window`.
